Risorse digitali per l’assiriologia

Assiriologia sp., a.a.2020/2021

Erica Scarpa1

19 febbraio 2021

PDF scaricabile qui

Databases

cdli

ARCHIBAB

EbDA

BDTNS

ORACC

Sullo standard del cdli, vedi Chiarcos et al. (2018). Sull’encoding e le lingue di markup vedi Del Freo, Di Filippo (2014), 36. Su EbDA, database relazionali e compresenza di diversi livelli di informazioni, vedi Di Filippo et al. (2018).

Ricerca bibliografica

OPAC

JSTOR

KeiBi

NaBuCCo

BDTNS

EbDA

Reference Management Softwares

BibDesk

JabRef

zotero

  • zotero software + connector
  • plugins
  • Una library condivisa per questo progetto: risorse-bibliografiche-2021

Mendeley

EndNote (paid)

Papers (paid)

Bookends (paid)

Citation Style Language

  • GitHub repo

markdown

  • markdown guide
  • per scrivere in markdown: typora, ma ne esistono molti altri

BetterBibTeX

pandoc

  • per installare pandoc
  • prova pandoc online
  • pandoc for academic writing: YouTube 1, YouTube 2

markdown

h1 Heading

h2 Heading

h3 Heading

h4 Heading

h5 Heading
h6 Heading

Horizontal Rules

Emphasis

This is bold text

This is bold text

This is italic text

This is italic text

Strikethrough

Blockquotes

Blockquotes can also be nested…

…by using additional greater-than signs right next to each other…

…or with spaces between arrows.

Lists

Unordered

  • Create a list by starting a line with +, -, or *
  • Sub-lists are made by indenting 2 spaces:
    • Marker character change forces new list start:

      • Ac tristique libero volutpat at

      • Facilisis in pretium nisl aliquet

      • Nulla volutpat aliquam velit

  • Very easy!

Ordered

  1. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet

  2. Consectetur adipiscing elit

  3. Integer molestie lorem at massa

  4. You can use sequential numbers…

  5. …or keep all the numbers as 1.

Start numbering with offset:

  1. foo
  2. bar

Code

Inline code

Indented code

// Some comments
line 1 of code
line 2 of code
line 3 of code

Block code “fences”

Sample text here...

Syntax highlighting

var foo = function (bar) {
  return bar++;
};

console.log(foo(5));

Tables

Option Description
data path to data files to supply the data that will be passed into templates.
engine engine to be used for processing templates. Handlebars is the default.
ext extension to be used for dest files.

Right aligned columns

Option Description
data path to data files to supply the data that will be passed into templates.
engine engine to be used for processing templates. Handlebars is the default.
ext extension to be used for dest files.

link text

link with title

Images

Plugins

Subscript / Superscript

  • 19th
  • H2O

Footnotes

Footnote 1 link.2

Footnote 2 link3.

Inline footnote4 definition.

Duplicated footnote reference5.

Bibliografia

Adams, Douglas. 1995. The Hitch Hiker’s Guide to the Galaxy: A Trilogy in Five Parts. Penguin Random House.

Chiarcos, Christian, Émilie Pagé-Perron, Ilya Khait, Niko Schenk, Lucas Reckling. 2018. “Towards a Linked Open Data Edition of Sumerian Corpora.” In Proceedings of the Eleventh International Conference on Language Resources and Evaluation (LREC 2018), 2437–44. Miyazaki: European Language Resources Association (ELRA). https://www.aclweb.org/anthology/L18-1387.

Del Freo, Maurizio, Francesco Di Filippo. 2014. “LiBER: un progetto di digitalizzazione dei testi in scrittura lineare B.” Archeologia e calcolatori, no. 25: 33–50.

Di Filippo, Francesco, Massimo Maiocchi, Lucio Milano, Renzo Orsini. 2018. “The ‘Ebla Digital Archives’ Project: How to Deal With Methodological and Operational Issues in the Development of Cuneiform Texts Repositories.” Archeologia e Calcolatori 29: 117–42.

  1. erica.scarpa@gmail.com, erica-scarpa.github.io↩︎

  2. Footnote can have markup. See also Adams (1995).

    They can also have multiple paragraphs.↩︎

  3. Footnote text.↩︎

  4. Text of inline footnote↩︎

  5. Footnote text.↩︎
